log: === ROUND 1 ===

→ 1/2 targets affected.

→ Yuan-Ti — Armored Escapist loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 11 vs DC 21]
Frost Giant attacks Yuan-Ti — Armored Escapist with Greataxe: [d20:20+9=29 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 46 damage. Yuan-Ti — Armored Escapist HP: 0/59
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 1 rounds ===
